title: Design System: Chris Neddy's Restaurant Dashboard

display.purpose: Page titles, masthead-style section headers. One per view. Fraunces with opsz 144 + SOFT 30.

headline.purpose: Panel heads, brand name in sidebar, prose intros. Fraunces italic with opsz 96 + SOFT 50.

title.purpose: Vendor names, secondary headings inside panels. Fraunces 17px, italic-capable.

body.purpose: Default running text, nav items, non-numeric table cells. DM Sans 13px. Cap line length at 65–75ch.

number.purpose: Every total, KPI, currency figure. DM Sans 600 with tabular-nums lining-nums. Inherits ink at rest, accent on parent row hover.

label.purpose: Section captions, panel-head departments. DM Sans uppercase, 10px, 0.18em tracking.

mono.purpose: Folios, SKUs, brand-issue strings, kbd chips. JetBrains Mono 10px, 0.12em tracking, tabular figures.

shadows.name: focus-rail
shadows.purpose: The only shadow allowed. A red focus rail on .inv-row / .order-row :focus-visible — not elevation, a focus ring on a non-rectangular target.

motion.name: ease-editorial
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for state transitions and the dock-in reveal. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: duration-row-bar
motion.purpose: The .inv-row / .order-row red proofmark bar scaleY(0→1) transition.

motion.name: duration-dock-in
motion.purpose: First-paint dock-in reveal duration. Stagger steps at 60ms increments via .dock-in-1 through .dock-in-12.

motion.name: live-pulse
motion.purpose: The .live-dot opacity pulse (1 → 0.35 → 1) marking real-time data.

components.name: Inv Panel
components.description: Warm-paper panel framed by a hairline-bold border. Replaces shadcn <Card> on /dashboard/*. No shadow, no rounded-xl.
components.html:
DepartmentNo. 042

Body content sits on the warm paper, inheriting ink as the default text color.
components.css: .ds-inv-panel { position: relative; background: rgba(255, 253, 247, 0.72); border: 1px solid #c9beaf; border-radius: 2px; padding: 18px 20px; color: #1a1613; font-family: 'DM Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-inv-panel__head { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding-bottom: 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8dfd3; margin-bottom: 14px; } .ds-inv-panel__dept { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #a69d92; } .ds-inv-panel__folio { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #a69d92; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-inv-panel__body { margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Inv Row
components.description: Pressable ledger line. Hover reveals a 4px red proofmark bar (scaleY 0→1, 220ms ease-out-quart) and recolors the total to accent.
components.css: .ds-inv-row { position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 28px minmax(0, 2.2fr) minmax(130px, 0.9fr) 28px; gap: 18px; align-items: center; padding: 18px 20px; border: none; border-top: 1px solid #e8dfd3; background: transparent; color: #1a1613; text-align: left; width: 100%; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; transition: background-color 160ms ease; } .ds-inv-row:first-child { border-top: 0; } .ds-inv-row:hover, .ds-inv-row:focus-visible { background: rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.045); outline: none; } .ds-inv-row:focus-visible { box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 #dc2626; } .ds-inv-row::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 8%; bottom: 8%; width: 4px; background: #dc2626; transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: center; transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.2, 1); } .ds-inv-row:hover::before, .ds-inv-row:focus-visible::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .ds-inv-row__folio { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #a69d92; letter-spacing: 0.12em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; text-align: right; } .ds-inv-row__vendor { min-width: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; } .ds-inv-row__vendor-name { font-family: 'Fraunces', 'Iowan Old Style', Georgia, serif; font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 96, 'SOFT' 40; font-style: italic; font-weight: 500; font-size: 17px; color: #1a1613; } .ds-inv-row__store { font-family: 'DM Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #6b625a; } .ds-inv-row__store em { font-style: italic; color: #a69d92; font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 13px; } .ds-inv-row__total { font-family: 'DM Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15.5px; letter-spacing: -0.014em; color: #1a1613; font-feature-settings: 'tnum', 'lnum'; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums; text-align: right; transition: color 180ms ease; } .ds-inv-row:hover .ds-inv-row__total { color: #dc2626; } .ds-inv-row__chev { color: #a69d92; opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-4px); transition: opacity 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; justify-self: end; } .ds-inv-row:hover .ds-inv-row__chev { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); color: #dc2626; }

components.name: Toolbar Button
components.description: Hairline-stroked rectangle, sharp corners. Hover darkens the stroke to ink; active flips border + text to accent on the wash.
components.html: <button class="ds-toolbar-btn" type="button">All stores</button> <button class="ds-toolbar-btn ds-toolbar-btn--active" type="button">This week</button>
components.css: .ds-toolbar-btn { background: transparent; border: 1px solid #c9beaf; color: #1a1613; padding: 7px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-family: 'DM Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.005em; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 120ms ease, background-color 120ms ease, color 120ms ease; } .ds-toolbar-btn:hover { border-color: #1a1613; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02); } .ds-toolbar-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #dc2626; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-toolbar-btn--active { border-color: #dc2626; color: #dc2626; background: #fcecec; }

components.name: Search Shell
components.description: Hairline-bordered input shell with leading icon and trailing kbd chip. Sharp corners, focuses by darkening the border to ink.
components.css: .ds-search-shell { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid #c9beaf; padding: 6px 10px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); min-width: 260px; transition: border-color 120ms ease; color: #6b625a; border-radius: 0; } .ds-search-shell:focus-within { border-color: #1a1613; } .ds-search-shell input { background: transparent; border: none; outline: none; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; width: 100%; color: #1a1613; } .ds-search-shell input::placeholder { color: #a69d92; } .ds-kbd-chip { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; padding: 1px 5px; border: 1px solid #c9beaf; color: #6b625a; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

components.name: Editorial Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar nav row with a 2px red rail that scales Y on hover (half) and active (full). DM Sans 13px body, accent-dark text on accent-bg when active.
components.html: Operations Analytics
components.css: .ds-nav-item { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 7px 16px 7px 18px; color: #1a1613; font-family: 'DM Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: color 120ms ease, background-color 120ms ease; } .ds-nav-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 20%; bottom: 20%; width: 2px; background: #dc2626; transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: center; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #1a1613; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.025); } .ds-nav-item:hover::before { transform: scaleY(0.55); } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #7c1515; background: #fcecec; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-item--active::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .ds-nav-item__icon { width: 13px; height: 13px; color: #6b625a; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-item--active .ds-nav-item__icon { color: #dc2626; }

components.name: Platform Stamp
components.description: Rotated rubber-stamp label for an order's source. Border drawn in currentColor, 0.5deg tilt, paper ground at 40% white. Color is data-only; always paired with a text label.
components.html: DOORDASH UBEREATS GRUBHUB CHOWNOW
components.css: .ds-stamp { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 7px 2px; border: 1.5px solid currentColor; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'DM Sans', ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.1; transform: rotate(-0.5deg); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); margin-right: 6px; } .ds-stamp[data-platform="doordash"] { color: #eb1700; } .ds-stamp[data-platform="ubereats"] { color: #0b0b0b; } .ds-stamp[data-platform="grubhub"] { color: #f15c26; } .ds-stamp[data-platform="chownow"] { color: #16a085; } .ds-stamp[data-platform="in-house"] { color: #4a4541; }

components.name: Live Dot
components.description: A 6px red dot pulsing on a 1.8s cycle. Always paired with a JetBrains Mono 'LIVE' label.
components.css: @keyframes ds-live-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.35; } } .ds-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b625a; } .ds-live__dot { display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #dc2626; animation: ds-live-pulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-live__dot { animation: none; } }

components.name: Perforation
components.description: Dashed horizontal rule used to break ledger groups by date or store. Mimics the perforated tear-line on a printed report.
components.css: .ds-perforation { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #a69d92; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 8px 0; } .ds-perforation::before, .ds-perforation::after { content: ''; flex: 1; border-top: 1px dashed #c9beaf; }

narrative.overview:
This is a back-office newspaper, not a SaaS dashboard. The surface is warm cream paper with a fine SVG fiber grain, hairline-ruled like a financial broadsheet's tables, set in Fraunces italic display, DM Sans for figures, and JetBrains Mono for folios and stamps. A single red proofmark — #dc2626 — sits in for the editor's pencil: it underlines totals on hover, fills the active nav rail, and marks state changes. Nothing else is colored unless it's a platform stamp.

The system explicitly rejects three failure modes named in PRODUCT.md: Toast / Square POS brightness (oversized blue buttons, friendly emoji), Notion / Coda card sprawl (rounded-xl cards with soft shadows nested inside other cards), and Linear / Vercel dark SaaS (slate-900 with neon accents). Density and reconciliation legibility win over visual flourish — the user is closing books at 11pm, not browsing screenshots.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream paper (#fbf6ee → #f4ecdf gradient with radial highlights and a 5%-opacity fractal-noise grain overlay).
Hairline frames at 1px (#e8dfd3 and #c9beaf). No shadows. No rounded-xl. Radius is 2px or 0.
Two-tier type: Fraunces italic for prose and display; DM Sans 500–600 with tabular-nums lining-nums for every number; JetBrains Mono for captions, folios, SKUs, status stamps.
One accent (red #dc2626) reserved for state. A red bar that scales Y(0→1) on row hover; the row's total turns red simultaneously.
A staggered dock-in reveal (60ms steps, 480ms duration, cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.2, 1)) on first paint.

rules.name: The Earn-the-Red Rule
rules.body: Red is reserved for state changes. If --accent appears at rest on more than one element on a screen — outside an .is-active nav item or an inv-stamp — something is wrong. The proofmark works because it's rare.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: Both ink and paper are tinted toward warm hues. #000 and #fff never appear on /dashboard/*. Even icon strokes inherit currentColor from var(--ink) or var(--ink-muted).

rules.name: The Color-Plus-Label Rule
rules.body: Platform stamps are color-coded but always paired with the platform's text label. No color-only signaling — the user closing books at 11pm may be color-blind, tired, or both.

rules.name: The Two-Tier Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is for prose and display. DM Sans is for numbers. JetBrains Mono is for captions and folios. Crossing the lines is a regression — a Fraunces-italic dollar amount or a DM Sans display heading both fail the system.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Every figure is set with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums and font-feature-settings: 'tnum', 'lnum'. Columns must reconcile to the pixel; proportional figures break the ledger metaphor.

rules.name: The Optical-Size Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is variable — set font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 96 for headlines, 'opsz' 144 for display, 'SOFT' 30–50 to match the era. Default Fraunces (no axis settings) reads literary, not editorial.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: box-shadow for elevation is forbidden on /dashboard/*. If a surface needs to feel 'lifted', increase its background opacity against the cream — don't add a shadow.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Every visible boundary is 1px solid of either --hairline (#e8dfd3) for inner rules and row separators or --hairline-bold (#c9beaf) for panel outer borders, toolbar strokes, and search-shell frames. Two weights — that's the entire vocabulary.

rules.name: The Grain Rule
rules.body: The fractal-noise overlay sits at opacity: 0.05 with mix-blend-mode: multiply. Lifting the opacity above 0.07 makes the surface look dirty; dropping it below 0.03 makes the paper look flat. Don't tune it.

dos: Do use the editorial tokens — --ink, --ink-muted, --ink-faint, --paper, --paper-deep, --hairline, --hairline-bold, --accent — for every color decision on /dashboard/*.
Do set every figure (KPI, total, count, currency) in DM Sans 500–600 with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums.
Do wrap interactive list rows with .inv-row or .order-row and let the existing ::before red-bar pattern carry the hover state.
Do compose page sections with .inv-panel (warm-cream background, 1px solid var(--hairline-bold), 2px radius, no shadow).
Do set Fraunces with explicit font-variation-settings (opsz 96 for headlines, opsz 144 for display, SOFT 30–50) — default Fraunces reads too literary.
Do stagger first-paint reveals with .dock-in-1 through .dock-in-12 (60ms steps, 480ms duration, cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.2, 1)).
Do pair every platform stamp with a text label.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — disable the dock-in stagger and the row-hover scaleY transition.
donts: Don't use generic Tailwind colors on /dashboard/* — no bg-sky-*, text-emerald-*, border-violet-*, no slate-900 backgrounds. The four CLAUDE.md tripwires are non-negotiable.
Don't ship Toast / Square POS aesthetics — bright primary blues, oversized buttons, friendly-emoji empty states are explicit anti-references from PRODUCT.md.
Don't ship Notion / Coda card sprawl — <Card className="rounded-xl shadow-sm"> is wrong everywhere on the dashboard. Use .inv-panel.
Don't ship Linear / Vercel dark SaaS — slate-900 with neon-gradient accents is exactly what this is rejecting.
Don't apply a box-shadow for elevation. The system has no shadow vocabulary; tonal layering and hairlines do that work.
Don't set Fraunces italic on a number, or DM Sans on a display title. Crossing the type lanes breaks the system.
Don't use hover:bg-muted/50 on a list row. Use .inv-row or .order-row.
Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere on /dashboard/*. Tint every neutral toward the warm-paper hue.
Don't scale the proofmark red beyond state. If --accent appears at rest on more than one element per screen (outside an active nav item or a stamp), the design has lost its line.
Don't color-code without labeling. Platform stamps are color + text, never color alone.
